lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

questions.text: What were the Israelites supposed to do with the treasures of Jericho?
answers: Give them to God
Keep them for themselves
Use the gold to make an idol
Hide them in the desert
He stole some of the treasures of Jericho
He refused to fight in battle
He was a spy for Ai
He forgot to return treasure he found

questions.text: Why didn’t the Israelites send their whole army to Ai?
answers: It was a small city with only a few people
They were too tired after the Battle of Jericho
They didn’t know where Ai was
They were trying to show off

questions.text: What happened at the first battle of Ai?
answers: The Israelites lost and were chased away
The Israelites won easily
The people of Ai surrendered
It was a tie

questions.text: Why didn’t God help the Israelites win the first battle of Ai?
answers: Because Achan had sinned
Because the army was too small
Because they forgot to make a sacrifice first
Because Ai was too strong

questions.text: What did Achan do with the treasures he stole?
answers: He hid them under his tent
He gave them to his friends
He threw them into the river
He sold them at the market

questions.text: How did Joshua find out who had sinned?
answers: God narrowed it down by tribe, group, and family
Achan confessed right away
The soldiers voted
The king of Ai told them

questions.text: What happened to Achan and the stolen treasures?
answers: They were destroyed
They were returned to Jericho
They were thrown into the river
They were given to the priests

questions.text: What happened in the second battle of Ai?
answers: Ai was totally defeated and burned to the ground
The Israelites lost again
Ai immediately surrendered
The battle was canceled
